salaryAndWagesID.description: Xero unique identifier for a salary and wages record

earningsRateID.description: Xero unique identifier for an earnings rate

numberOfUnitsPerWeek.description: The Number of Units per week for the corresponding salary and wages

ratePerUnit.description: The rate of each unit for the corresponding salary and wages

numberOfUnitsPerDay.description: The Number of Units per day for the corresponding salary and wages

daysPerWeek.description: The days per week for the salary.

effectiveFrom.description: The effective date of the corresponding salary and wages

status.description: The current status of the corresponding salary and wages

paymentType.description: The type of the payment of the corresponding salary and wages

workPatternType.description: The type of the Working Pattern of the corresponding salary and wages
